title: orobus macrorrhizus var. pyrenaicus
intro: Orobus macrorrhizus var. pyrenaicus, also known as Pyrenean kidney-vetch, is a perennial legume plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Orobus macrorrhizus var. pyrenaicus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in certain regions of Europe, particularly in the Pyrenees mountains.
